ref: So Isaac told him, “Serve me the wild meat, and I can give you my blessing.” Jacob gave him some meat, and he ate it. He also gave him some wine, and he drank it.

translated: When the hunter came, he said, “I have not come to greet you, I have come to look for my dog and my gun, and to find my children. I am going to the stream, isn’t it? I have come to look for my dog there.”

translated: Jakob was very fond of Rachel and wanted to marry her, but he was given Lea instead. Rachel was barren, so she gave her maid Bilhah to her husband Jakob to bear children.
